hero.title: Ferienhaus Bela
hero.subtitle: Your dog-friendly holiday home in Carinthia, directly on the Vellach river. Pure relaxation and nature, only 4 km from Bad Eisenkappel.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ferienhaus Bela
welcome.p1: Our holiday house is located about 4 km after the spa town of Bad Eisenkappel, directly on the Vellach river (Slovenian: Bela). The idyllic location allows you to enjoy nature away from hustle and noise.
welcome.p2: Those seeking relaxation and active holidaymakers can enjoy nature on both sides of the border. Our location near the Slovenian border offers numerous excursion opportunities in two countries.
welcome.p3: Dogs are not only allowed but WARMLY WELCOME and stay free of charge!

house.title: Cozy Holiday House
house.description: 84 m² living space on two floors, fully equipped for up to 4 adults and 2 children.

dogs.title: Dog-Friendly
dogs.description: 1,300 m² property directly on the Vellach. Dogs stay free with our dog care package.

location.title: Perfect Location
location.description: Directly on the Vellach river, only 4 km from Bad Eisenkappel, near the Slovenian border.

activities.title: Various Activities
activities.description: Hiking, cycling, swimming, climbing and more - something for everyone.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Do you have questions?
contact.description: We look forward to your inquiry! Whether availability, special requests or questions about your dog holiday - we are happy to help.

footer.description: Your dog-friendly holiday home in Carinthia, directly on the Vellach river. Pure relaxation and nature, only 4 km from Bad Eisenkappel.
